---
name: New Tool Request
about: Suggest a new tool for ARCANA
title: "[Tool Request] "
labels: enhancement, new-tool
assignees: 
---

## Tool Name

`category_action` (e.g. `terrain_create`, `material_set_color`)

## Category

- [ ] Scene Management
- [ ] Transform / GameObject
- [ ] Material / Shader
- [ ] Terrain
- [ ] Lighting
- [ ] VFX / Particle
- [ ] Audio
- [ ] Animation
- [ ] Optimization
- [ ] VRChat Specific
- [ ] Blender - Mesh
- [ ] Blender - Modifier
- [ ] Blender - Material
- [ ] Blender - VRM
- [ ] Other

## Description

What should this tool do?

## Example AI Prompt

```
"Create a grassy terrain with rolling hills, 500x500 meters"
```

## Expected Parameters

```json
{
  "size": [500, 500],
  "texture": "grass"
}
```

## Priority

- [ ] Essential (core workflow)
- [ ] Nice to have
- [ ] Advanced / Niche
